# Cluster Placement Groups

Manage OCI Cluster Placement Groups from Kubernetes with an initial controller-backed ClusterPlacementGroup rollout.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `clusterplacementgroups` |
| Support Status | Preview |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to ClusterPlacementGroup while the service-local work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
